title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Madurai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services:
Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services!
